name: Goblin's Nest
description: A reeking warren of tunnels gouged into the cliffs north of Plainstown. Goblin scavengers have moved in from the deeper west, bolder now that the wards are weak.

name: The Old Forest by the Sea
description: Salt-warped trees grow inland from the western shore, their roots fed on something that should have stayed buried. The wood remembers, and pulls at travellers who come too close.

name: Orc Stronghold
description: A ruined hill-keep in the western mountains, retaken by an orc warband. Their drums roll down the passes most nights now, and patrols from the realm's borders have stopped coming back.

name: Mage Coven
description: A black-stone redoubt above the snowline, raised by Vorkhaal the Inverted and his apprentices. The air around the gate crackles like a held-in lightning strike. Even with the master gone, the work inside has not stopped.

name: Crypt
description: A lichyard cut into the bluffs above Shanty Town. Broken-open coffins lie strewn across the floor; the smell would shame an open grave. With the seals failing, the long-dead have stopped staying in their boxes.

name: Dragon's Lair
description: A vast cave system beneath Hargorn's island, hot enough that the stone weeps. Smoke and fire lick the entrance day and night. The closer you get to the heart, the less the air remembers how to be air.
